category_sources: Official Launchpad overview describes safe-rm as a safety tool replacing /bin/rm with a protected wrapper.
source_facts.description says it wraps rm to prevent dangerous deletion of files.
display_name_sources: Official Launchpad project title is Safe-rm.
docs_sources: Official Launchpad overview is the best official documentation surface found for safe-rm.
repo_sources: Official Launchpad Code page gives git clone https://git.launchpad.net/safe-rm.
tags_sources: Official Launchpad overview describes configurable protected paths and the Rust rewrite announcements.
